sections.title: General Explanations
sections.description: This section defines general principles for the code

sections.title: General Exceptions
sections.description: Act of a person who, at the time of doing it, by reason of unsoundness of mind, is incapable of knowing the nature of the act

sections.title: Punishment and its kinds
sections.description: Punishment includes death, life imprisonment, imprisonment and fine

sections.title: Acts of several persons in furtherance of common intention
sections.description: When a criminal act is done by several persons in furtherance of the common intention of all

sections.title: Commencement of criminal liability
sections.description: A person is liable for any act in pursuance of or furtherance of a common intention

sections.title: Punishment for abetment
sections.description: Whoever abets any offence shall, if the act abetted is committed in consequence of the abetment be punished with the same punishment

sections.title: Punishment for unlawful assembly
sections.description: Whoever being part of an unlawful assembly, is guilty of rioting, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months

sections.title: Punishment for rioting
sections.description: Whoever is guilty of rioting shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months

sections.title: Obscene acts and songs
sections.description: Whoever, to the annoyance of others does any obscene act in any public place, or sings, recites or utters any obscene song

sections.title: Punishment for voluntarily causing hurt
sections.description: Whoever, except in the case provided by section 334, voluntarily causes hurt shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months

sections.title: Voluntarily causing hurt by means of poison
sections.description: Whoever causes hurt by means of poison or any deleterious substance shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to six months

sections.title: Causing grievous hurt by act endangering life or personal safety
sections.description: Whoever causes hurt to any person by doing any rash or negligent act which endangers human life or the personal safety of others

sections.title: Act endangering life or personal safety through negligence
sections.description: Whoever does any act so rashly or negligently as to endanger human life or the personal safety of others

sections.title: Causing hurt by act endangering life or personal safety
sections.description: Whoever causes hurt to any person by doing any act which he knows or has reason to believe to be likely to cause hurt

sections.title: Causing grievous hurt by act endangering life
sections.description: Whoever causes grievous hurt to any person by doing any act which he knows or has reason to believe to be likely to cause grievous hurt

sections.title: Punishment for wrongful restraint
sections.description: Whoever wrongfully restrains any person shall be punished with simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to one month

sections.title: Punishment for wrongful confinement
sections.description: Whoever wrongfully confines any person shall be punished with simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to one year

sections.title: Punishment for criminal force
sections.description: Whoever uses criminal force to any person shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three months

sections.title: Punishment for criminal force when armed with deadly weapon
sections.description: If the offence be committed by using criminal force armed with a deadly weapon or instrument

sections.title: Punishment for insulting modesty
sections.description: Whoever, intending to insult the modesty of any woman, utters any word or makes any gesture or exhibits any object with such intention

sections.title: Punishment for rape
sections.description: Whoever commits rape shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which shall not be less than seven years but which may be for life

sections.title: Unnatural offences
sections.description: Whoever voluntarily has carnal intercourse against the order of nature shall be punished with imprisonment for life

sections.title: Definition of theft
sections.description: Whoever, intending to take dishonestly any movable property out of the possession of any person without that person's consent

sections.title: Theft in dwelling house
sections.description: Whoever commits theft in any building which is used as a human dwelling or as a place for the custody of property

sections.title: Punishment for theft by clerk or servant
sections.description: Whoever, being a clerk or servant, commits theft in respect of any property in the possession of his master or employer

sections.title: Punishment for dacoity
sections.description: Whoever commits or attempts to commit dacoity shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to ten years

sections.title: Cheating
sections.description: Whoever cheats shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years

sections.title: Punishment for criminal trespass
sections.description: Whoever commits criminal trespass shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to three months

sections.title: Punishment for house-trespass
sections.description: Whoever commits house-trespass shall be punished with simple imprisonment for a term which may extend to three months

sections.title: House-trespass in order to commit offence punishable with life imprisonment
sections.description: Whoever commits house-trespass in order to the commission of any offence punishable with life imprisonment

sections.title: Lurking house-trespass
sections.description: Whoever commits lurking house-trespass shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years

sections.title: Punishment for forgery
sections.description: Whoever commits forgery shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to two years

sections.title: Forgery for the purpose of cheating
sections.description: Whoever forges any document and uses it as genuine, knowing it to be forged and intending by its use to cause wrongful gain or loss

sections.title: Using as genuine a forged document
sections.description: Whoever fraudulently or dishonestly uses any document which he knows or has reason to believe to be a forged document

sections.title: Counterfeiting currency notes
sections.description: Whoever, without the authority of the Government of India or the Reserve Bank of India, makes or executes or causes to be made or executed any currency note

sections.title: Cruelty by husband or his relatives
sections.description: Whoever, being the husband or the relative of the husband of a woman, subjects such woman to cruelty shall be punished

sections.title: Punishment for defamation
sections.description: Whoever, by words either spoken or intended to be read, or by signs or by visible representations, makes or publishes any imputation

sections.title: Punishment for criminal intimidation
sections.description: Whoever threatens another with any injury to his person, reputation or property, or to the person or reputation of any one in whom that person is interested

sections.title: Insult intended to provoke breach of peace
sections.description: Whoever, being aware that his words will be likely to provoke any person to commit an offence against public tranquillity or against public order

sections.title: Punishment for criminal intimidation
sections.description: Whoever threatens another with any injury to his person, reputation or property, or to the person or reputation of any one in whom that person is interested

sections.title: Criminal intimidation by an anonymous written or electronic communication
sections.description: Whoever commits the offence of criminal intimidation by an anonymous written or electronic communication

sections.title: Word, gesture or act intended to insult the modesty of a woman
sections.description: Whoever, intending to insult the modesty of any woman, utters any word or makes any gesture or exhibits any object with such intention
